title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
